html:
Your Personalized Recovery Plan

Teresa’s shedding has carried on under the weight of chronic emotional stress—an ongoing load that can quietly keep follicles in defense mode. At this stabilization phase, the plan helps her retake control: steadying sleep rhythms, easing the mental churn from doom‑scrolling, and rebuilding nourishment with more protein‑rich meals. Each habit shores up her stress‑response and gives her follicles the calm they need to shift from fragile survival toward healthy renewal. This is the stage where steady consistency starts turning things around. 🌱

Small calm choices today create the stability regrowth needs.
